title: Iceberg Summer
description: Welcome to the 4th Iceberg Modded Minecraft Server! 🎉 Massive update adds new biomes, furniture, blocks, and mobs, plus returning favorites like hats, aircraft, and waystones. With revamped dimensions, festive decorations, and expanded cooking mods.
body:
Welcome to the 4th Iceberg Modded Minecraft Server! Our biggest and coolest update yet, made for friends, family, and total chaos (in the best way possible). This version packs a ton of new stuff, fixes, and glow-ups that make the world way more fun to explore and build in.

We’ve got a new mod update system that keeps everything running smoother than ever, plus tons of new furniture (the old mod finally works again 👀). We're using new biome generation mods so re-check all those wood types you've previoulsy ignored... they probably look really good now! You’ll also find new blocks, decorations, and fun interactive items. Check every type, there’s a lot.

OG hats, instruments, aircraft, and waystones have all returned 🔥. We've also added holiday and Christmas decorations, like trees, lights, and nutcrackers for seasonal vibes. Both the Nether and End got complete makeovers, and new Waystone towers make fast travel super easy.

Familiar mobs from Alex’s Mobs and Naturalist fill the world, plus tons of new Farmer’s Delight add-ons for cooking, brewing, and festive food. Add in new animations, vanilla-style guns and quality-of-life mods, and you’ve got an iceberg that’s bigger, smoother, and way more fun to slip around on!
